inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Search Query
inputs.description: Natural-language query — entities are ranked by semantic similarity to this text.

inputs.name: database
inputs.label: Database
inputs.description: Wired database name — overrides the Database property. Connect a Global Database node here.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Results (JSON)
outputs.description: Array of matching entities ranked by cosine similarity score (0–1).

outputs.name: speed
outputs.label: Speed
outputs.description: Total execution time including embedding generation.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error / Warning
outputs.description: Error message, or a warning when some entities were skipped due to missing embeddings.

properties.label: Embedding Model
properties.description: Must match the model used when vectorizing the database.
